_comment: The haunted arcade: three WASM ghosts, one per cabinet. Boot the demo and touch nothing — each ghost walks its exclusive roster slot to its own machine (left / center / right along the -Z wall) and boots it, and the room wakes itself: fullscreen eases to side-by-side eases to big-top as the screens light. Pure data — the same engine, summoned differently. Forge the cartridge first (`Puck.Demo --forge-volley volley.gbc`), then `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-haunted.json`. Parse-validation does not check modulePath — the run path does.
